# FISHFINDER Meta-Analysis: Fish Naming Errors in Recent Literature

## Overview

We analyzed **95** recent open-access papers (published 2023--present) involving North American fish species. Papers were retrieved from OpenAlex and filtered to English-language, open-access articles with at least one author at a US, Canadian, or Mexican institution. Title keywords were used to select multi-species field studies (e.g., community surveys, species checklists, assemblage assessments).

## Key Findings

- **40.0%** of papers contained at least one naming error (outdated synonym or misspelling)
- **30.5%** used at least one outdated species name (pre-8th edition synonym)
- **23.2%** contained at least one misspelled species name
- **50.5%** referenced species whose names changed between the 7th and 8th editions (not errors, but worth verifying)
- A total of **1341** unique species names were encountered across all papers

## Classification Breakdown

| Classification | Count | Description |
|---------------|-------|-------------|
| Valid | 717 | Exact match in AFS 8th edition |
| Changed | 112 | Valid but updated from 7th edition |
| Common Name | 0 | Matched via common name |
| Outdated | 50 | Pre-8th edition synonym |
| Misspelled | 39 | Levenshtein distance <= 2 from valid name |
| Unknown | 225 | Recognized genus, species not in AFS database |

## Most Common Outdated Names

| Outdated Name | Papers Using It |
|---------------|----------------|
| *Misgurnus fossilis* | 4 |
| *Tilapia zilli* | 2 |
| *Notropis volucellus* | 2 |
| *Stizostedion vitreum* | 2 |
| *Tilapia rendalli* | 2 |
| *Tilapia zillii* | 2 |
| *Ariopsis seemanni* | 2 |
| *Gonostoma elongatum* | 1 |
| *Heterandria bimaculata* | 1 |
| *Astyanax fasciatus* | 1 |

## Most Common Misspellings

| Misspelled Name | Papers |
|-----------------|--------|
| *Xiphophorus helleri* | 2 |
| *Sparus aurata* | 2 |
| *Cyrpinus carpio* | 1 |
| *Lestidiops afnis* | 1 |
| *Diaphus rafnesquii* | 1 |
| *Myctophum afne* | 1 |
| *Astronesthes nigra* | 1 |
| *Stomias afnis* | 1 |
| *Vinciguerria attenuate* | 1 |
| *Clarias batradrus* | 1 |

## Most Common Changed Names (7th → 8th Edition)

| Species | Papers |
|---------|--------|
| *Micropterus salmoides* | 10 |
| *Mugil cephalus* | 7 |
| *Salvelinus fontinalis* | 7 |
| *Carassius auratus* | 6 |
| *Thunnus albacares* | 4 |
| *Poecilia reticulata* | 4 |
| *Mallotus villosus* | 3 |
| *Thunnus thynnus* | 3 |
| *Chanos chanos* | 3 |
| *Balistes polylepis* | 3 |

## Journals Represented

The analysis covered papers from **68** different journals.
